articles.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
articles.description: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.
articles.titleJa: エルニーニョ現象が発生、異常気象を脅威と科学者らが発表
articles.summary: 米国の科学者らがエルニーニョ現象の公式発生を発表。異常気象と気温上昇への懸念が高まっている。

articles.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
articles.description: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.
articles.titleJa: 米国とイラン、2日連続で中東全域で攻撃応酬
articles.summary: イランが米国の攻撃に対し、クウェート、ヨルダン、バーレーンにある米国施設を標的にしたと発表。バーレーンの首都では被害が報告された。

articles.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
articles.description: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、「インフレを愛している」と発言 米国の物価は過去3年で最速のペースで上昇
articles.summary: 米国大統領トランプ氏がインフレを「愛している」と発言。後にインフレがもっと高くなかったことを愛していると釈明した。

articles.title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
articles.description: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.
articles.titleJa: エアインディア171便墜落の原因を巡る激しい論争
articles.summary: エアインディア171便墜落の最終調査結果は未発表だが、今後数日で新たな情報が明らかになる可能性もある。

articles.title: Thai court sentences two men to death over Bangkok shrine bombing
articles.description: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.
articles.titleJa: タイの裁判所、バンコクの寺院爆破事件で2人に死刑判決
articles.summary: 11年前にエラワン寺院で発生した爆破事件で、タイの裁判所が2人に死刑判決を下した。この事件で20人が死亡し、120人が負傷した。

articles.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
articles.description: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
articles.titleJa: ヴァンス氏、イスラエル首相ネタニヤフは「いくつかの点で間違っている」と発言
articles.summary: 米国副大統領がイスラエルのネタニヤフ首相について、同国の利益を「積極的に主張する」が、それが常に米国の利益と一致するわけではないと述べた。

articles.title: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
articles.description: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.
articles.titleJa: ニックスのファン、NBAファイナル史上最大の逆転劇に熱狂
articles.summary: 水曜日の試合結果により、ニックスはNBAファイナルでの歴史的な勝利まであと1勝となった。

articles.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
articles.description: During his trip, the Pope will appeal for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
articles.titleJa: レオ教皇、移民の危険な旅を強調するためカナリア諸島を訪問
articles.summary: レオ教皇がカナリア諸島を訪れ、より良い生活を求める移民に対し、人道的な対応と敬意ある受け入れを訴える予定。

articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo sings about heartbreak but she's already chosen her wedding song
articles.description: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.
articles.titleJa: オリヴィア・ロドリゴ、失恋について歌うも既に結婚式の曲は決定済み
articles.summary: 人気ポップスターがハッピーソングの難しさや、グラストンベリーでの不安発作について語った。

articles.title: Four days of extreme rain killed 7% of world's rarest orangutans, study says
articles.description: Climate change-induced weather events are pushing orangutan populations to extinction, says a study.
articles.titleJa: 4日間の豪雨により世界で最も希少なオランウータンの7%が死亡、研究で判明
articles.summary: 気候変動による異常気象がオランウータン個体群を絶滅に追い込んでいると研究が指摘。

articles.title: Iran war ceasefire close to collapse as Trump promises more strikes and eventual US control of Iranian oil and gas — follow live
articles.description: The US will take "total control" of Iranian oil production in the "not too distant future," President Trump claimed. Recent US and Iranian strikes have rendered a ceasefire "meaningless," Tehran has said. DW has more.

articles.title: India news: New Delhi protests US strike that killed 3 Indian sailors, summons envoy
articles.description: India summoned a senior US diplomat after a strike on the tanker Settebello off Oman. Also in the news in India this Thursday, the 'Cockroach' party demonstrated in Pune demanding the education minister's removal.

articles.title: ECB raises rates to tackle inflation surge
articles.description: The European Central Bank has been moving to rein in inflation after a long pause on rate changes. The policy shift is aimed at tamping down prices while raising fresh concerns about growth.

articles.title: Musk's SpaceX IPO holds both promise and peril
articles.description: Elon Musk's rocket and AI company presents potential for investors. But its futuristic, unproven plans also carry significant financial risks.

articles.title: Ukraine: Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant's power cut off
articles.description: An attack near Europe's largest nuclear power plant in Russian-occupied Ukraine has caused an outage in the area. Meanwhile, a Ukrainian drone attack has sparked a fire at a refinery in southern Russia. DW has more.

articles.title: Thailand: 2 men sentenced to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
articles.description: Two Uyghur men convicted of murder for planting a bomb at the popular Erawan Shrine in the heart of Bangkok said they will appeal the death sentence.

articles.title: DRC referendum bill intensifies constitutional standoff
articles.description: Congolese lawmakers this week passed a referendum bill that could lead to constitutional reform ahead of the 2028 elections. The opposition has warned of a "constitutional coup."

articles.title: Sex doll art sparks debate at German president's residence
articles.description: Beyond a headline-grabbing bronze, contemporary artworks draw attention to political power at an exhibition held at Bellevue Palace before the state building closes for renovation.

articles.title: Hungary makes major deal with Ukraine, its former enemy
articles.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar announced an agreement with Kyiv about rights for a Hungarian minority in Ukraine. It paves the way for Ukraine to start EU accession talks — unthinkable under Hungary's last PM Orban.

articles.title: Germany news: Merz pushes sweeping reform agenda
articles.description: Chancellor Friedrich Merz is outlining the German government's position on a range of issues ahead of a key EU summit. Lawmakers are also set to debate major domestic reforms alongside foreign policy. DW has more.

articles.title: Trump targeting immigrants from countries hit most by climate shocks
articles.description:
A Guardian analysis reveals how most of 39 countries facing US entry restrictions are most vulnerable environmentally

‘Every day it’s more barriers’: how the US is shutting out climate refugees

Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown is largely targeting people from the countries most vulnerable to displacement from climate-driven disasters, a Guardian analysis shows.
As the Trump administration pushes policies to boost planet-heating fossil fuels, millions of people are being forced to flee their homelands due to storms, floods and droughts worsened by the climate crisis.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、気候変動の影響を最も受けている国からの移民を標的に
articles.summary: トランプ政権が気候変動に脆弱な国々からの移民を標的にする政策を進めていることがガーディアン紙の分析で判明した。

articles.title: Global brands ‘likely’ using mineral that funds rebels accused of atrocities in DRC, investigation finds
articles.description:
Amazon and Sony among firms that may have sourced coltan, used in phones, from supply chains controlled by the M23 rebels, says Global Witness
Leading global brands including Amazon, Ericsson and Sony are “likely” to have sourced minerals linked to a militia accused of widespread sexual violence, summary executions and torture, a new investigation claims.
The companies allegedly, but unknowingly, acquired coltan smuggled from mines in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) that are occupied by the M23 militia, which has committed myriad atrocities in eastern DRC.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 調査により、世界的ブランドがDRCで残虐行為を行う反乱軍の資金源となる鉱物を「使用している可能性が高い」ことが判明
articles.summary: グローバル企業が、DRCで残虐行為を行う反乱軍の資金源となっている鉱物を無意識に調達している可能性が指摘された。

articles.title: Man shot dead during protest against proposed US Ebola quarantine facility in Kenya
articles.description:
Police dispersed demonstrators in Nanyuki, 120 miles from Nairobi, amid rising anger at US plans
Kenyan police have shot dead a man during a protest against a proposed Ebola quarantine facility for US citizens.
Patrick Wahome, who has organised protests in Nanyuki against the centre, told Reuters on Tuesday the man died from a gunshot wound to the head. Reporters from the agency saw his body lying motionless in a police van with a large head wound.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ケニアで米エボラ隔離施設建設計画への抗議デモ中、男性が射殺される
articles.summary: ケニアで米国のエボラ隔離施設建設計画に反対するデモ中、参加者の一人が警察に射殺された。

articles.title: Bandits in north-west Nigeria abduct villagers they invited to discuss peace talks
articles.description:
Thirty-nine people taken near Magamin Diddi village in Maradun municipality, north-west Zamfara state, police say
Armed bandits in north-west Nigeria abducted dozens of villagers whom they invited to a meeting about potential peace negotiations, authorities and residents said on Monday, highlighting the region’s worsening security.
According to local police, 39 people were seized on Sunday during a meeting in the forest near Magamin Diddi village in the Maradun municipality of north-west Zamfara state. But some residents and officials believe the number of those abducted could be as high as 50.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリア北西部の武装集団、和平交渉を呼び出した村人を拉致
articles.summary: ナイジェリア北西部で武装集団が和平交渉と称して村人を呼び出し、数十人を拉致した。

articles.title: ‘Extreme fear’ among immigrants as backlash sweeps South Africa
articles.description:
African migrants say legal status offers little protection as rallies against illegal immigration gain momentum
African migrants in South Africa say they are living in fear after a series of marches calling for illegal immigrants to leave reignited long-held xenophobic sentiment in the country.
March & March, a campaign group at the forefront of recent protests, has given people living illegally in the country until 30 June to leave, without specifying what will happen to those who do not.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 南アフリカで反移民感情が広がり、移民の間に「極度の恐怖」
articles.summary: 南アフリカで不法移民排斥運動が激化し、移民の間で外国人嫌悪に対する極度の恐怖が広がっている。

articles.title: Cuba hopes for World Cup respite from US sabre-rattling – but prepares for the worst
articles.description:
With some matches being held in nearby Miami, a Cuban response to US military action could mar the tournament
As Cuba crumbles under a nearly five-month-long US oil blockade, many on the island hope that the World Cup might save the island from US attack – or at least offer a respite until the competition ends on 19 July.
“The beginning of the World Cup will make it more difficult for the United States to carry out a military action in Cuba,” said Carlos Alzugaray, Cuba’s former ambassador to the EU. “Cuba is very close to the US, and can hit many targets inside the US, especially in south Florida, with drones or other weapons.”
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: キューバ、米国との剣幕を交わす中でW杯による猶予を期待するも最悪の事態に備える
articles.summary: 米国の油田封鎖で苦しむキューバは、W杯開催中の米国の軍事行動猶予を期待しつつ、最悪の事態に備えている。

articles.title: Brazilian woman, 38, accused of years of ‘elaborate fraud’ by posing as a child
articles.description:
Amanda Maria Souza de Oliveira faces fraud charges after allegedly persuading family to take her into their home
A 38-year-old woman has been arrested in Brazil accused of pretending to be a 12-year-old girl to deceive a couple who took her into their home for more than a year.
Amanda Maria Souza de Oliveira was charged in the southern state of Santa Catarina with fraud and false identity offences.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ブラジル人女性（38）、長年にわたり子どもを装い「巧妙な詐欺」の容疑で逮捕
articles.summary: ブラジルで38歳の女性が12歳の少女を装い、夫婦を騙して1年以上同居していた詐欺容疑で逮捕された。

articles.title: Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons in visit to Guantánamo Bay
articles.description:
US defense secretary continues ramp-up of pressure against country including sanctions and devastating oil blockade
Pete Hegseth has warned Cuba against acquiring weapons that could threaten the United States, during a visit to the US military base at Guantánamo Bay.
Washington has ramped up pressure against Cuba with sanctions and a devastating oil blockade, and Donald Trump has repeatedly signaled that the Cuban government could be the next after Venezuela to fall to US pressure.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ヘグセス氏、グアンタナモ湾訪問中にキューバに対し兵器取得を警告
articles.summary: 米国防長官ヘグセス氏がグアンタナモ湾を訪問し、キューバに対し米国を脅かす兵器の取得を警告した。

articles.title: ‘Not just a singer’: Argentinians queue for miles to mourn biggest rockstar most of world has never heard of
articles.description:
Hundreds of thousands gather to remember Carlos ‘Indio’ Solari, who inspired cross-generational devotion, especially among working class
The line stretched for more than 7km (four miles). Mourners sang rock songs, waved banners, and carried speakers blasting music while smoke rose from makeshift barbecues and vendors sold T-shirts bearing the image of a bald man with sunglasses.
As evening fell, a drizzle set in, but the queue remained. At the end of the line in Avellaneda, outer Buenos Aires, stood a chapel containing the body of a rock star.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「ただの歌手ではない」：世界がほとんど知らなかった大物ロックスターの死を悼むため、アルゼンチン人が何マイルも列をなす
articles.summary: アルゼンチンで国民的ロックスターが死去し、何マイルも続く長い列ができ、数十万人がその死を悼んだ。

articles.title: The vanishing of Nicolás Maduro: how the former dictator is being erased from Venezuela
articles.description:
Billboards are being painted over and former allies seem eager to forget the man they once glorified
For years, his bewhiskered face stared down from propaganda billboards glorifying the supposedly revolutionary rule of a dictator who styled himself as “the protector of the people”.
The spin-doctored adoration was such that factories churned out plastic action figures exalting Nicolás Maduro as an “indestructible” and “iron-fisted” caped crusader nicknamed “Super Moustache”.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ニコラス・マドゥロの消失：ベネズエラで元独裁者がどのように消去されているか
articles.summary: ベネズエラで元独裁者ニコラス・マドゥロのイメージがプロパガンダから消去されつつあることが報じられた。

articles.title: Two killed and several injured in house fire on Spanish island of Mallorca
articles.description: The floor where the fire started was cordoned off, along with the levels directly above and below it, authorities said.
articles.titleJa: スペインのマヨルカ島で住宅火災、2人死亡、数人負傷
articles.summary: スペインのマヨルカ島で発生した住宅火災で2人が死亡し、数人が負傷した。火災発生階とその上下階が封鎖された。

articles.title: China tests AI robot cleaners in homes
articles.description: China is testing AI robot cleaners in Beijing homes, where machines assist human cleaners in early trials focused on data collection and domestic tasks.
articles.titleJa: 中国が家庭でAIロボット清掃員の試験を実施
articles.summary: 中国が北京の家庭でAIロボット清掃員の試験運用を開始。データ収集と家事支援に焦点を当て、人間と協力して作業を行う。

articles.title: Naples ring road is Italy's first smart road: reshaping future mobility
articles.description: Naples' ring road has been certified by Italy's transport ministry as the country's first Smart Road. Sensors, traffic monitoring and car-to-road communication herald the mobility of tomorrow.
articles.titleJa: ナポリ環状線がイタリア初のスマートロードに認定：未来のモビリティを再構築
articles.summary: イタリア運輸省により、ナポリの環状線が同国初のスマートロードに認定された。センサーや交通監視、車路間通信で未来のモビリティを先導する。

articles.title: Scientists discover where whales go to die
articles.description: A newly discovered whale graveyard in the southeastern Indian Ocean is providing scientists with a rare glimpse into how marine life can thrive for millions of years at great depths.
articles.titleJa: 科学者たちがクジラが死にに行く場所を発見
articles.summary: インド洋南東部で新たなクジラの墓場が発見され、科学者たちは深海生物が数百万年にわたりどのように繁栄してきたかを知る貴重な手がかりを得た。

articles.title: UK defence secretary resigns with stinging attack on Keir Starmer's military spending plans
articles.description: The Defence Investment Plan has faced repeated delays despite warnings that the UK's armed forces face a major funding gap.
articles.titleJa: 英国防大臣が辞任、キア・スターマーの軍事費計画を厳しく批判
articles.summary: 英国防大臣が辞任し、キア・スターマーの軍事費計画を厳しく批判。英国軍は資金不足に直面、防衛投資計画は遅延していた。

articles.title: US strikes another tanker in Hormuz as it tightens Iranian port blockade
articles.description: CENTCOM disabled another tanker attempting to bypass the Iran blockade in a third strike this week, just hours after three Indian crew members were confirmed dead in Wednesday's strike on the MT Settebello.
articles.titleJa: 米国、ホルムズで別のタンカーを攻撃、イランの港湾封鎖を強化
articles.summary: 米国が今週3度目となる攻撃で、イランの封鎖を迂回しようとした別のタンカーを無力化した。水曜日の攻撃でインド人乗組員3人の死亡が確認されている。

articles.title: US will seize and control Iran's Kharg Island and other key oil facilities, Trump says
articles.description: Trump's social media post comes after the US and Iran traded strikes for a third day, pushing the region closer to the resumption of a full-scale war.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、米国がイランのハルグ島やその他の主要石油施設を掌握すると発言
articles.summary: トランプ氏が、米国がイランのハルグ島など主要石油施設を掌握すると投稿。米イラン間の攻撃応酬が続き、地域は本格的な戦争再開に近づいている。

articles.title: Four Seasons reveals second ultra-luxury yacht with sprawling suites and one-to-one service
articles.description: Fresh from the launch of its first vessel, Four Seasons has revealed plans for Four Seasons II, a new ultra-luxury yacht set to debut in 2028.
articles.titleJa: フォーシーズンズ、広々としたスイートと1対1のサービスを備えた2隻目の超高級ヨットを発表
articles.summary: フォーシーズンズが、最初の船の就航に続き、2028年にデビュー予定の新たな超高級ヨット「フォーシーズンズII」の計画を発表した。

articles.title: From food and drink to seats and wifi, these are the best airlines in Europe
articles.description: The 2026 APEX Best Awards, which are based on passenger ratings, are out now.
articles.titleJa: 食事から座席、Wi-Fiまで、これらがヨーロッパのベスト航空会社
articles.summary: 乗客評価に基づいた2026年APEXベストアワードが発表され、ヨーロッパのベスト航空会社が食事、座席、Wi-Fiなどの項目で選出された。

articles.title: ECB raises interest rates for the first time in three years as Iran war fuels inflation
articles.description: The European Central Bank has lifted its deposit facility rate by 0.25% to 2.25%, marking a decisive pivot back to tightening as the Iran war pushes eurozone inflation to its highest level in nearly three years.
articles.titleJa: ECB、イラン戦争によるインフレ悪化を受け3年ぶりに利上げ
articles.summary: 欧州中央銀行は、イラン戦争によるインフレ悪化を受け、預金金利を3年ぶりに0.25%引き上げ2.25%とした。ユーロ圏のインフレは高水準に。

articles.title: Palestine Action activists could face UK ‘terror’ sentences: What we know
articles.description: Four members of the Palestine Action group could be sentenced as 'terrorists' over Elbit factory raid in 2024.
articles.titleJa: パレスチナ行動の活動家が英国で「テロ」刑に直面する可能性：私たちが知っていること
articles.summary: パレスチナ行動の活動家4名が、エルビット工場襲撃事件で英国にて「テロリスト」として刑に処される可能性がある。

articles.title: Iran shuts Hormuz strait: But wasn’t it already closed?
articles.description: The strait is a crucial maritime route, through which 20 percent of global oil and natural gas is shipped in peacetime.
articles.titleJa: イランがホルムズ海峡を閉鎖：しかし、すでに閉鎖されていなかったか？
articles.summary: イランがホルムズ海峡の閉鎖を発表。ここは世界の石油・天然ガスの20％が輸送される重要な海上交通路である。

articles.title: ‘Dignity has no passport’: Pope makes appeal for migrants in Canary Islands
articles.description: Pope Leo will meet with about 1,000 migrants on Friday who have braved dangerous Atlantic waters to reach Europe.
articles.titleJa: 「尊厳にパスポートはない」：教皇がカナリア諸島で移民に訴え
articles.summary: レオ教皇がカナリア諸島で移民約1000人と面会。彼らは危険な大西洋を渡りヨーロッパに辿り着いた。

articles.title: At least 22 killed as Pakistani military helicopter crashes in Kashmir
articles.description: Officials launch inquiry after 'technical fault' causes an army Mi-17 to crash in Pakistan-administered Kashmir.
articles.titleJa: パキスタン軍ヘリがカシミールで墜落、少なくとも22人死亡
articles.summary: パキスタン統治下のカシミールで軍用ヘリMi-17が技術的欠陥により墜落し、少なくとも22人が死亡。当局が調査を開始した。

articles.title: Video shows aftermath of Iranian attack in Bahrain
articles.description: Iranian strikes on Bahrain left cars, homes and buildings damaged in Hamad Town and Manama.
articles.titleJa: イランによるバーレーン攻撃の余波を映す映像
articles.summary: イランによるバーレーンへの攻撃後、ハマドタウンとマナーマで車、家屋、建物が損傷した様子が映像で公開された。

articles.title: Did US sneak 100 million barrels of oil out of Hormuz, as Trump claims?
articles.description: The maths doesn't appear to hold up, even though the US has likely managed to get some oil out of the strait.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏の主張、米国はホルムズから1億バレルの原油をこっそり運び出したのか？
articles.summary: トランプ氏が主張する、米国がホルムズ海峡から1億バレルの原油を運び出したという説について、その数字は成り立たないようだ。

articles.title: Massive Neymar mural unveiled on Brazil street
articles.description: A massive 850-square-meter street mural of football star Neymar da Silva has been unveiled in Brazil's Novo Hamburgo.
articles.titleJa: ブラジルの街路にネイマールの巨大壁画がお披露目
articles.summary: ブラジルのノヴォ・アンブルゴで、サッカー選手ネイマールの巨大なストリート壁画（850平方メートル）が披露された。

articles.title: Embattled Palestinian president of Oxford Union: ‘I’m not resigning’
articles.description: Arwa Elrayess, the first Palestinian to lead University of Oxford's debating society, has been troubled by falsehoods.
articles.titleJa: 窮地のオックスフォード・ユニオン初のパレスチナ人会長：「辞任しない」
articles.summary: オックスフォード大学ディベート協会の初のパレスチナ人会長であるアルワ・エルライエス氏が、虚偽情報に悩まされながらも辞任しないと表明した。

articles.title: India says US hit another ship off Oman, confirms 3 dead in separate attack
articles.description: All 20 Indians aboard vessel involved in the latest incident are safe, said an Indian shipping ministry official.
articles.titleJa: インド、米国がオマーン沖で別の船を攻撃と発表、別の攻撃で3人死亡を確認

articles.title: Top five ‘must-watch’ matches of the group stage at World Cup 2026

articles.title: Israel and Iran flare-up could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand

articles.title: Who is the Somali referee barred from entering the US for the World Cup?

articles.title: He told us we were slaves - The fight  for justice on a Scottish fishing trawler

articles.title: Fifa World Cup 2026: What you need to know about South Africa

articles.title: Seven African players to watch at World Cup 2026

articles.title: Climate success stories: A pleasant surprise

articles.summary: グローバル・ノースの理解を超えた気候危機克服へのアプローチや知識を共有し、生存の可能性を高める。

articles.title: The signal we cannot ignore: What the LONDA 2025 report reveals about Africa’s digital rights
articles.description: The digital landscape is becoming increasingly dangerous for vulnerable groups. Technology-facilitated gender-based violence is a growing epidemic that most legal frameworks fail to address adequately.

articles.summary: LONDA 2025報告書は、アフリカでテクノロジーを悪用したジェンダーに基づく暴力が急増し、既存の法制度が対応できていない現状を指摘。

articles.title: Cinemas offer a platform for stories of resistance amid shrinking civic spaces in Africa

articles.title: Rubbish as a resource: How communities in Mozambique transform waste into climate solutions
articles.description: Faced with rapid urbanization, fragile waste management systems, youth unemployment and growing climate vulnerability, artists, activists, musicians, and community entrepreneurs in Mozambique develop local responses to address an environmental crisis.

articles.title: Ugandan activists make the case for ecofeminism
articles.description: In this edition of Undertones, we explore a narrative calling for women to play a central role in climate-related decision-making in Uganda.

articles.title: For most Nigeriens, France has no place in Niger

articles.title: How AI is upgrading African dictatorship

articles.title: Reporting when the internet goes dark: How journalists find workarounds when cut off

articles.titleJa: 気候変動：アンタルヤで開催されるCOP31でアフリカが要求すべきこと

articles.title: Meet three young people driving ecological activism in the Dominican Republic

articles.title: Who is talking about artificial intelligence in Ecuador?
articles.description: Ecuador is debating how to regulate artificial intelligence:, institutional gaps, and tensions between innovation, surveillance, education, inclusion, and responsible public governance are at the center of the conversation.
articles.titleJa: エクアドルでは誰が人工知能について語っているのか？
articles.summary: エクアドルではAI規制を巡る議論が活発。イノベーション、監視、教育、包摂、責任ある公共ガバナンス間の課題が中心テーマだ。

articles.title: In Barra do Turvo, Brazil, women promote biodiversity and harvest healthy food at fair prices
articles.description: A local agricultural collective in Barra do Turvo, Brazil, outside of São Paulo, is empowering women to earn an income, farm their own produce to promote self-sufficiency, and diversify crops.
articles.titleJa: ブラジル、バラ・ド・トゥルヴォで女性たちが生物多様性を推進し、公正な価格で健康的な食料を収穫
articles.summary: ブラジル、サンパウロ郊外の女性農業共同体が、女性の収入向上、自給自足、作物多様化を支援し、健康的な食料供給を促進している。

articles.title: Countless endangered species are making a comeback due to global conservation efforts
articles.description: These success stories are a model for community-rooted conservation and population revival that could help other countries and regions rebuild their withering ecosystems.
articles.titleJa: 地球規模の保全活動により、数多くの絶滅危惧種が復活を遂げている
articles.summary: 世界的な保全活動が功を奏し、多くの絶滅危惧種が回復。これらの成功例は、他の地域のエコシステム再建のモデルとなっている。

articles.title: The death of a relentless mother reopens the wound of Venezuela’s political repression
articles.description: Carmen Navas’s passing reveals alleged institutional coverups, deepening concerns about repression, impunity, and Venezuela’s ongoing democratic collapse.
articles.titleJa: 執拗な母親の死がベネズエラの政治的抑圧の傷を再び開く
articles.summary: カルメン・ナバスの死去が、ベネズエラでの制度的隠蔽疑惑を再燃させ、政治的抑圧や民主主義の崩壊への懸念を深めている。

articles.title: Rosa Pachurí Paraba: How Monkox indigenous women are leading Bolivia’s response to wildfires
articles.description: Bolivia’s 2024 wildfires devastated Santa Cruz, but Indigenous Chiquitano and Monkox communities led recovery through collective organization, ancestral knowledge and fire management strategies, and revived food systems amid delayed state response.
articles.titleJa: ロサ・パチュリ・パラバ：モンコク先住民女性がいかにボリビアの山火事対応を主導しているか
articles.summary: 2024年のボリビア山火事に対し、モンコク先住民女性たちが伝統知識と組織力で復興を主導。遅れる国家対応の中で食料システムを再生している。

articles.title: Attacks on trans identities become a strategic political tool in Brazil
articles.description: In the last decade in Brazil, transphobia has become one of the main tools for disseminating misinformation. In many cases, it is spread by elected politicians with millions of followers
articles.titleJa: トランスジェンダーのアイデンティティへの攻撃がブラジルで戦略的な政治的道具に
articles.summary: ブラジルでは過去10年間、トランスフォビアが誤情報の主要な拡散手段となり、政治家によって戦略的に利用されている。

articles.title: Family of British toddler criticises police as Australian inquiry into cold case murders begins
articles.description: NSW inquiry will also examine whether notorious serial killer Ivan Milat was responsible for more murders.
articles.titleJa: 英国人幼児の家族、未解決殺人事件の豪州捜査開始で警察を批判
articles.summary: オーストラリアで未解決殺人事件の捜査が始まり、英国人幼児の家族が警察を批判。悪名高い連続殺人犯イヴァン・ミラの追加犯行も調査される。

articles.title: Chinese police detain man after dog torture videos spark outrage
articles.description: The man allegedly posed as an "adopter" of animals but ended up abusing the dogs and cats he took in.
articles.titleJa: 犬の拷問動画が怒りを呼び、中国警察が男を拘束
articles.summary: 中国で犬の拷問動画が社会の怒りを買い、警察が男を拘束。男は動物の「里親」を装い、引き取った犬や猫を虐待していたとされる。

articles.title: Thousands march in Pakistan-administered Kashmir as clashes kill at least 15
articles.description: An uneasy silence has blanketed the capital, with empty streets, closed shops and patrolling police.
articles.titleJa: パキスタン支配下のカシミールで数千人がデモ、衝突で少なくとも15人死亡
articles.summary: パキスタン支配下のカシミールで数千人規模のデモが発生し、衝突で少なくとも15人が死亡。首都は静けさに包まれ、通りには人がなく、商店は閉鎖され警察が巡回中。

articles.title: Three Indian sailors missing after US says it hit tanker in Gulf of Oman
articles.description: India's government said 21 crew had been rescued after the hit on the Settebello off the coast of Oman.
articles.titleJa: 米国がオマーン湾でタンカーに衝突、インド人船員3人が行方不明
articles.summary: オマーン湾でタンカーが衝突事故を起こし、インド人船員3人が行方不明。インド政府は、オマーン沖でセッテベッロ号の乗組員21人が救助されたと発表した。

articles.title: Growing backlash in Japan over Trump's use of anime characters
articles.description: The US president has angered some fans by using the images of characters like Pikachu and Naruto.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏によるアニメキャラクター使用に日本で反発が拡大
articles.summary: ドナルド・トランプ米大統領がピカチュウやナルトなどのアニメキャラクター画像を使用したことに対し、日本で一部のファンからの反発が広がっている。

articles.title: World's largest chipmaker does not rule out price rises as costs increase
articles.description: In a rare interview, a senior executive at TSMC discusses the AI boom, the geopolitics of chips and what it means for the price of electronics.
articles.titleJa: 世界最大の半導体メーカー、コスト増で値上げの可能性を排除せず
articles.summary: 世界最大の半導体メーカーTSMC幹部が、AIブームや半導体地政学、電子機器価格への影響を語り、コスト増加による値上げの可能性を示唆した。

articles.title: Air India crash pilot's father vows to defend son's reputation
articles.description: Investigators are expected to soon release an update on the crash, which killed 260 people last year.
articles.titleJa: エア・インディア墜落事故パイロットの父親、息子の名誉を守ると誓う
articles.summary: エア・インディア墜落事故で260人が死亡した事故について、調査団が近く更新情報を発表予定。パイロットの父親は、息子の名誉を守ると誓った。

articles.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
articles.description: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
articles.titleJa: ミャンマー内部で反政府勢力が劣勢、国軍が男性を強制徴兵
articles.summary: BBCはミャンマーの反政府勢力に同行取材し、彼らが劣勢にあり、国軍が男性を強制徴兵している実態を報じた。

articles.title: How one of India's most successful female politicians is losing her party
articles.description: Mamata Banerjee's once-dominant Trinamool Congress party is unravelling, weeks after losing power in West Bengal.
articles.titleJa: インドで最も成功した女性政治家の一人が党を失いつつある経緯
articles.summary: インドの成功した女性政治家、マムター・バネルジー氏のトリナムール・コングレス党が、西ベンガル州での政権喪失後、解体に向かっている。

articles.title: DDG Nordquist: WTO remains the foundation of global trade despite growing challenges
articles.description: At an event in London on 10 June, Deputy Director-General DJ Nordquist emphasized that the WTO continues to provide the foundation for the large majority of global trade, even as the trading system adapts to new technologies, shifting supply chains and geopolitical uncertainty. She also stressed the importance of advancing WTO reform while preserving the predictability and transparency on which businesses depend. DDG Nordquist spoke at the launch of the Dubai Multi Commodities Centre's Future of Trade Report 2026. Her remarks are below.
articles.titleJa: ノードクイスト事務次長：WTOは課題が増大する中でも世界貿易の基盤であり続ける
articles.summary: WTOのノードクイスト事務次長は、課題が増える中でもWTOが世界貿易の基盤であると強調。新技術、サプライチェーン、地政学的不確実性への適応と改革の重要性を説いた。

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Uruguay
articles.description: The Sixth review of the trade policies and practices of Uruguay takes place on 10 and 12 June 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of Uruguay.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策レビュー：ウルグアイ
articles.summary: ウルグアイの貿易政策と慣行に関する第6回レビューが2026年6月10日と12日に実施される。WTO事務局とウルグアイ政府の報告書に基づき行われる予定。

articles.title: Members discuss preparations to bring E-Commerce Agreement into force by mid-2027
articles.description: Co-sponsors of the E-Commerce Agreement (ECA) met on 9 June to discuss preparations for ratifying the world's first baseline set of global digital trade rules. The ratification process forms part of the interim arrangements adopted by over 60 members at the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), pending incorporation of the ECA into the WTO rulebook.
articles.titleJa: 2027年半ばまでの電子商取引協定発効に向けた準備を加盟国が協議
articles.summary: 電子商取引協定（ECA）の共同提案国は、世界初のグローバルデジタル貿易規則の発効に向けた準備を協議した。60以上の加盟国が承認した暫定的な取り決めの一環。

articles.title: Fish Fund supports Tonga's first notification under the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies
articles.description: The WTO Fish Fund has marked an important milestone with the submission to the WTO of the first-ever fisheries subsidy notification made possible through support from the Fund. The submission on 3 June by Tonga under the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies has additional significance given the developing Pacific region's exposure to the effects of harmful fisheries subsidies. The notification was prepared during a workshop held from 20 to 22 May in Nuku'alofa, Tonga, as part of a project funded by the Fish Fund, and contributes to Tonga’s implementation of the Agreement.
articles.titleJa: 水産基金がトンガによる漁業補助金協定に基づく初の通報を支援
articles.summary: WTO水産基金の支援により、トンガが漁業補助金協定に基づく初の通報をWTOに提出した。これは太平洋地域の開発途上国にとって重要な一歩。

articles.title: South Africa notifies launch of safeguard investigation on A3 and A4 office paper
articles.description: On 8 June 2026, South Africa notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards regarding the initiation on 5 June 2026 of a safeguard investigation on A3 and A4 office paper imported into the Southern African Customs Union (SACU).
articles.titleJa: 南アフリカ、A3およびA4事務用紙に関するセーフガード調査の開始を通知
articles.summary: 南アフリカは、南部アフリカ関税同盟（SACU）に輸入されるA3およびA4事務用紙に対するセーフガード調査を2026年6月5日に開始したことをWTOに通知した。

articles.title: WTO members review preshipment inspection challenges and customs valuation notifications
articles.description: WTO members examined a number of questions related to preshipment inspection (PSI) at an 8 June meeting of the Committee on Customs Valuation. Drawing on recent private sector input and member experiences, the discussions focused on future Committee work related to PSI and how PSI issues should continue to be addressed. The Committee also examined 34 customs valuation notifications submitted by members for review and a trade concern raised by one member.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、船積み前検査の課題と関税評価通知をレビュー
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は6月8日の関税評価委員会で、船積み前検査（PSI）に関する問題と34件の関税評価通知を検討。貿易円滑化に向けた議論が行われた。

articles.title: STDF launches Annual Report 2025, "Accelerating Safe Trade: From Innovation to Scale"
articles.description: Following World Food Safety Day on 7 June, the Standards and Trade Development Facility (STDF) has launched its 2025 Annual Report, Accelerating Safe Trade: From Innovation to Scale. The report showcases how investments in strengthening sanitary and phytosanitary (SPS) systems are improving food safety, facilitating trade and supporting sustainable development.
articles.titleJa: STDF、2025年年次報告書「安全な貿易を加速：イノベーションから規模へ」を発表
articles.summary: STDFは2025年年次報告書を発表。SPSシステムの強化投資が食品安全、貿易促進、持続可能な開発をいかに改善しているかを示している。

articles.title: Goods trade holding up despite Middle East conflict and high energy prices
articles.description: Global merchandise trade appears to have remained resilient in the first half of 2026 despite headwinds from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which seem to have been partly offset by rising demand for electronic components related to investment in artificial intelligence, according to the latest WTO Goods Trade Barometer.
articles.titleJa: 中東紛争と高エネルギー価格にもかかわらず、物品貿易は堅調に推移
articles.summary: WTO物品貿易バロメーターによると、2026年上半期のグローバル物品貿易は、中東紛争などの逆風にもかかわらず堅調に推移した。

articles.title: Experience-sharing on transparency in spotlight at import licensing committee meeting
articles.description: Public and private sector representatives joined the Committee on Import Licensing’s second experience-sharing session on 4 June, focusing on improving WTO members' transparency and notification compliance. Speakers from Cambodia, the European Union, Myanmar, Thailand and the United States shared practices on notifications, public-private cooperation, access to information and digitalization of licensing procedures. The Committee also reviewed recent notifications, addressed 12 specific trade concerns and heard an EU presentation on its Electronic System for Agricultural Non-Customs Formalities during its regular session.
articles.titleJa: 輸入許可委員会会議で透明性に関する経験共有が注目される
articles.summary: 輸入許可委員会で、WTO加盟国の透明性と通知遵守の改善に焦点を当てた経験共有セッションが開催。各国が実践事例を共有し、議論が深まった。

articles.title: WTO members advance discussions on key issues for unlocking services trade
articles.description: At a series of meetings held from 2 to 4 June, the WTO Council for Trade in Services and its subsidiary bodies discussed a broad range of issues for possible future work, ranging from the services aspects of electronic commerce to the green services economy. Members also agreed to hold a dedicated workshop to share information on the recognition of foreign professionals' qualifications. Discussions continued on ways to help least developed countries better participate in services trade, facilitate remittance transfers, and improve the classification of environmental services.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、サービス貿易を活性化するための主要課題に関する議論を前進
articles.summary: WTOサービス貿易理事会で、電子商取引のサービス側面からグリーンサービス経済に至るまで、サービス貿易活性化のための幅広い課題が議論された。
